playbook.intent: Audit gap -> WCAG 2.2 AA across product + shipped remediation + compliance evidence ready for legal/ADA.
playbook.scope: Accessibility lead runs a 6-week program across the product. Includes automated + manual + AT audit, prioritized remediation, regression tests, an a11y user panel, CI gates, and a compliance evidence pack. Done when all critical + major findings are remediated, AT regression tests pass, and compliance pack is filed with legal.

success-criteria.criterion: Full WCAG 2.2 AA audit complete (automated + manual + AT)
Regression tests with assistive technology pass in CI
A11y compliance pack (VPAT/ACR) filed with legal

stage.name: Scope + plan
stage.intent: Define what gets audited and what good looks like.

tasks.task: Inventory products + flows in scope
Pick WCAG 2.2 AA + applicable regional rules (ADA Title II 2026)
Define severity rubric + ship-blocking thresholds

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when scope is signed by product + legal.

stage.name: Automated + AI sweep

tasks.task: Run AI-assisted automated scan across product
Triage findings; reject false positives
Quick-fix low-effort high-impact items

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after triage is human-reviewed.

stage.name: Manual audit

tasks.task: Heuristic + manual review per WCAG 2.2 AA
Cognitive inclusion checks on flagship flows
Document each finding with severity + repro steps

stage.decision-gate: Advance when severities are confirmed by a second reviewer.

stage.name: AT testing
stage.intent: Test with the tools real users use.

tasks.task: Run NVDA + VoiceOver + JAWS test scripts on flagship flows
Recruit a small a11y user panel for live sessions
Capture critical issues missed by other layers

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after each flagship flow passes AT smoke test.

stage.name: Remediation
stage.intent: Ship the fixes, not just file them.

tasks.task: Prioritize critical + major findings into sprint backlog
Pair with engineering on patterns; update design system
Track burndown until criticals = 0

stage.decision-gate: Advance when criticals = 0 and majors are below threshold.

stage.name: Regression in CI

tasks.task: Wire a11y tests into CI pipeline
Add AT-based regression checks for flagship flows
Block merges on regression

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when CI has run a11y checks on >=2 release cycles.

stage.name: Compliance pack
stage.intent: Hand legal what they need to file.

tasks.task: Compile VPAT/ACR evidence
Map findings + fixes to WCAG criteria
Hand off to legal with sign-off

stage.decision-gate: Done when legal accepts the pack.

extra.value: [Stopping at automated -> misses keyboard + AT issues, No CI gate -> regressions appear by next release, Compliance pack written after fact -> evidence trail incomplete]
['Did a screen-reader user complete a flagship flow without help?', 'Are criticals at zero and majors below threshold?', 'Did legal accept the compliance pack?']

{human: faion get-content accessibility-audit-and-remediation-program-6-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content accessibility-audit-and-remediation-program-6-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content accessibility-audit-and-remediation-program-6-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
